recommendations.title: Fort Apache Napoli
recommendations.overview: The story of Giancarlo Siani, a journalist killed by the Neapolitan Mafia in 1985.

recommendations.title: Mary Forever
recommendations.overview: A teacher discovers his calling. Marco relocates to Palermo from Milan and takes a job teaching in a reform school while he waits for a high school position. He tries to understand and motivate his handful of students, reading them colloquial poetry,

recommendations.title: Boys on the Outside
recommendations.overview: Young men with no future have little in the present as well. Natale is released from prison: he takes up with his friends again but none can find work. Claudio, from Palermo, gets out of juvenile detention in Naples and he's met by Vita, a girl who's

recommendations.title: Pulp Fiction
recommendations.overview: A burger-loving hit man, his philosophical partner, a drug-addled gangster's moll and a washed-up boxer converge in this sprawling, comedic crime caper. Their adventures unfurl in three stories that ingeniously trip back and forth in time.

recommendations.title: Fantozzi: White Collar Blues
recommendations.overview: A good-natured but unlucky Italian is constantly going on a difficult situations, but never lose his mood.

recommendations.title: Be Sick… It's Free
recommendations.overview: Comedy about the flawed Italian healthcare system of the time and a doctor's expeirence with it.

recommendations.title: Good Bye, Lenin!
recommendations.overview: Alex Kerner's mother was in a coma while the Berlin wall fell. When she wakes up he must try to keep her from learning what happened (as she was an avid communist supporter) to avoid shocking her which could lead to another heart attack.

recommendations.title: The Great War
recommendations.overview: Italy, 1916. Oreste Jacovacci and Giovanni Busacca are called, as all the Italian youths, to serve the army in the WWI. They both try in every way to avoid serving the army.

recommendations.title: Grand Hotel
recommendations.overview: Guests at a posh Berlin hotel struggle through worry, scandal, and heartache.

recommendations.title: People I Know
recommendations.overview: A New York press agent must scramble when his major client becomes embroiled in a huge scandal.
